name: Sector Assault
short_description: In this arcade space shooter, combine weapons and equipment to create the perfect loadouts. Battle an enemy fleet as diverse as your own arsenal, dodging cruise missiles, phasing through lasers, and ramming targets as you fight to reclaim the sector!
detailed_description:
Sector Assault is a revolution of the classic Asteroids formula. Battle an enemy fleet as diverse as your own arsenal as you fight to reclaim the sector!

14 Loadout Options

Wield any combination of four weapons and equipment. Fire missiles and plasma torpedoes, get up close and personal with the Scattershot, or zap enemies with Chain Lightning. Equipment is even more flexible and allows you to stun targets, phase through attacks, or ram targets for massive damage!

16 Enemies and Their Variants

The enemy fleet includes everything from cruise missiles to teleporters. Evade mobile mines and sweeping lasers as you trade fire with heavily armed and armored juggernauts. Supercharged variants use special attacks non-stop, empowering them to fill your screen with projectiles.

30 Waves of Finely Crafted Mayhem

Enemies are capable of warping in formation or surrounding you without warning. Test your reflexes against endless combinations that support each other or overwhelm with brute force. Innovative controls allow you to master the chaos, and spawn timings are fine-tuned for a smooth and satisfying pace.

The Sublime Beauty of Deep Space

Sector Assault's backgrounds have been selected from thousands of randomly generated combinations. Each one is streaked with vivid nebulas and given parallaxing for added depth. Music and sound effects were handpicked with equal care to enhance the atmosphere.

Create the perfect loadouts and adapt faster than your enemy to secure the sector!
